name: Sweet Creamed Lobster Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the lobsters until cooked through. Remove the meat from the shells and cover, then cool.
2. Melt the butter in an enamelled cast-iron saucepan or a flame-ware saucepan.
3. Add the lobster meat to the melted butter and simmer over low heat for a few minutes. Gradually add the milk, stirring most of the time until hot.
4. Slowly incorporate the whipping cream, keeping it on a gentle stir. Simmer until hot but do not boil.
5. Allow the mixture to cool completely before covering and refrigerating for 12 to 24 hours to develop the full flavor of the lobster.
6. Reheat gently without boiling before serving. Season to taste with salt and pepper just before serving.
